title: 🚀 Introducing the DevDuo Apps Hub!
message: We've added a beautiful new space to explore the broader ecosystem, complete with a clean new look for upcoming project sneak peeks.
points: 🌐 DevDuo Apps Hub: Tap the new card in your Tools tab to discover our growing collection of premium, offline-first utility configurations and tools.
✨ Premium Golden Finish: Upcoming and preview releases are now beautifully highlighted with a luxury gold layout and a dedicated 'Coming Soon' badge.
📲 Quick Store Navigation: Added a direct link inside the hub to jump straight to our official developer page on the Google Play Store with a single tap.

title: ⚡ Throttled Ads & Fail-Safe Upgrades!
message: We've rolled out a massive update focusing on structural balance, smart ad throttling, and bulletproof offline reliability.
points: ⏱️ 5-Interaction Smart Gate: Interstitial ads are now persistent and optimized to trigger exactly on every 5th interaction across restarts.
🛡️ Fail-Safe Open Access: Complete elimination of blocking locks; if the ad network fails or goes offline, you bypass instantly.
🚀 Accelerated Layout Performance: Rewritten background layout queues to load heavy documents and tool assets faster than ever.

title: 💎 The Premium Ad-Free Fix!
message: We have completely re-engineered our subscription enforcement systems to ensure all premium members get a flawless, 100% ad-free experience.
points: 💎 Instant Premium Bypass: Ad loaders now instantly verify your active subscription status to bypass loading screens entirely.
🛡️ Zero Ad Interruptions: Resolved a persistent issue where premium users were still occasionally shown interstitial or rewarded ads.
⚡ Seamless Transitions: Completely eliminated background ad-fetching delays for subscribers when switching tools or opening files.

title: ⚡ The Fast-Launch Update!
message: Supercharge your workspace entry with high-performance launch controls and ironclad background security shields.
points: ⚡ Fast-Launch Switch: Toggle the introduction video clip on or off directly inside your Tools dashboard.
📋 Fluid Text Selection: Completely free manual paragraph selection handles keep you in absolute control over your references.
♻️ Optimized Layout Cycles: Refreshed lifecycle states guarantee zero black flashes or memory drops when swapping screens.

title: ✨ The Smart Time-Travel Update!
message: Never lose your reading progress again! Experience our ultimate modern viewport memory tracking systems.
points: ⏱️ Reading Location Saved: Automatically locks your anchor spot if you stay still for 4+ seconds.
↩️ One-Tap Smart Jump: Accidentally scrolled away? Snap straight back to your progress with our minimal bottom option bar.
🔒 Sealed Monetization Logic: Premium features work safely offline with secure ad-gate validation frames.
🐛 Zero-Crash Engine: Fully squashed background layout race-condition thread blocks for a flawless viewer experience.

title: ⚡ The Ultimate Power Tools Update!
message: We've completely supercharged your reading experience! Access a full suite of professional PDF tools directly from the viewer.
points: 🛠️ In-Viewer Power Tools: Compress, Merge, Split, and Extract pages without ever leaving your document.
🔔 Smart Update Hub: Stay in the loop! Get notified instantly when we drop exciting new features.
🖼️ Image & PDF Converters: Seamlessly convert PDFs to photos and vice versa, 100% offline.
✨ Performance Polish: Smoother scrolling, faster rendering, and completely squashed bugs.
